instruction: Write an HTML5 search form using input type="search" and a submit button labeled Search. Place the form inside a search landmark.
code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <title>Site search</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <header>
      <search>
        <form action="/search" method="get" role="search">
          <label for="site-query">Search documentation</label>
          <input id="site-query" name="q" type="search" required />
          <button type="submit">Search</button>
        </form>
      </search>
    </header>
  </body>
</html>
